name: Macaroni and Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 cans condensed tomato soup (10.75 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, brown the ground beef over high heat; drain well.
2. Transfer the cooked beef into the Crock-Pot.
3. Cook the macaroni according to package directions until it is barely tender; drain well.
4. Add the drained macaroni and remaining ingredients (mushrooms, tomato soup cans) to the Crock-Pot.
5. Stir just enough to blend all ingredients together.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
7. Serve 4 to 6 people.
